calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-30-2015 Vacated

Motion To Compel Defendant Bruce Allen To Provide Responses To Plaintiff Scofield/S Form Interrogatories General, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Alex Merchant (415-294-4111) appearing for Plaintiff and moving party Patrick Scofield. No appearance by Defendant.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF PATRICK SCOFIELD'S Motion To Compel Defendant Bruce Allen To Provide Responses To Plaintiff Scofield/S Form Interrogatories General, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions is GRANTED. Non-opposition filed. Defendant shall provide responses to discovery at issue within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Modified order for the same signed in open court.

Judge Ronald Evan Quidachay, Clerk N. Wong, Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2014 Set For Trial On Jul-20-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
